sectionHint: Pick a category, add chips per piece, then use copy to apply preferences to other pieces of the same item.
copyAllTooltip: Copy all preferences on this piece to the other pieces of this item
copiedAll: All preferences copied to other pieces
noItemsForKind: No catalog entries for this category
useNotesTab: Notes are edited on the Edit Item Notes tab.
notesOpenToolbar: Choose “Notes” in the category row above — a text field opens on the card for this piece.
notesFieldPlaceholder: Handling instructions, damage details, customer requests…
notesFieldHint: Up to 1000 characters. You can also edit notes on the “Edit Item Notes” step.
unsupportedKind: This preference type is not available here.
